items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I open I close
• I open the door I close the door
• I open the window I close the window
• I open the room I close the room
• I open the house I close the house

items.prompt: Eu abro a janela Eu fecho a janela
items.answer: I open the window I close the window

items.prompt: Eu abro a sala Eu fecho a sala
items.answer: I open the room I close the room

items.prompt: Eu abro o carro Eu fecho o carro
items.answer: I open the house I close the house

items.prompt: Eu tenho que ir ao centro hoje de manhã Eu quero ir ao cinema hoje à tarde
items.answer: I have to go downtown this morning I want to go to the movies this afternoon

items.text: How are you? He opens the office at 8:00
I open the door I close the door
